items.title: VoidZero’s Experimental Oxc Angular Compiler with Up to 20x Faster Build Performance
items.summaryShort: VoidZero’s Experimental Oxc Angular Compiler with Up to 20x Faster Build Performance. VoidZero has released an experimental Angular compiler in Rust, promising improved build performance compared to Angular CLI.

items.title: Microsoft Releases .NET 11 Preview 3 with Updates Across Runtime, SDK, MAUI, and ASP.NET Core
items.summaryShort: Microsoft Releases .NET 11 Preview 3 with Updates Across Runtime, SDK, MAUI, and ASP.NET Core. Microsoft has released .NET 11 Preview 3, the third preview of its upcoming Standard Term Support version due in November 2026.

items.title: Presentation: Agents, Architecture, & Amnesia: Becoming AI-Native Without Losing Our Minds
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Agents, Architecture, & Amnesia: Becoming AI-Native Without Losing Our Minds. Tracy Bannon shares a cautionary tale of "The Sorcerer’s Apprentice" to illustrate the risks of unbridled AI autonomy.

items.title: Sauce Labs Launches AI Agent to Automate Test Creation and Close the DevOps “Velocity Gap”
items.summaryShort: Sauce Labs Launches AI Agent to Automate Test Creation and Close the DevOps “Velocity Gap”. Sauce Labs has announced the general availability of Sauce AI for Test Authoring, an AI-driven agent designed to translate business intent directly

items.title: Mistral AI Introduces Workflows for Orchestrating Enterprise AI Processes
items.summaryShort: Mistral AI Introduces Workflows for Orchestrating Enterprise AI Processes. Mistral AI has launched Workflows, an orchestration layer for enterprise AI that is now in public preview.

items.title: Amazon, Meta join fight to end Google Pay, PhonePe dominance in India
items.summaryShort: Amazon, Meta join fight to end Google Pay, PhonePe dominance in India. PhonePe and Google Pay command 80% of India's UPI instant payments network.

items.title: Amazon's cloud business is surging — and so is its capital spending
items.summaryShort: Amazon's cloud business is surging — and so is its capital spending. The e-commerce giant is making more money than expected from AWS but it's also spending a lot, and will continue to do so in the near term, its chief executive said.

items.title: Sources: Anthropic could raise a new $50B round at a valuation of $900B
items.summaryShort: Sources: Anthropic could raise a new $50B round at a valuation of $900B. The maker of Claude has received multiple pre-emptive offers at valuations in the $850 billion to $900 billion range, according to sources familiar with the matter.
